posts.author: ngryf (Nick Gryfakis)
posts.cookedHtml:
The current Salesforce integration available to enterprise Monday.com users only supports the following standard salesforce objects: Campaign, Account, Case, Lead, Opportunity, Contact, Orders, and Users

This excludes important standard salesforce objects such as Opportunity Product and Product. The use case is to keep our product management team informed about new opportunities impacting their specific products.

Does anyone else have a need to expand the supported salesforce objects of this integration?
